title: Кино-постер
prompt_text: Create a cinematic movie poster based on the uploaded subject. Dramatic lighting, premium composition, bold title placement, high visual impact.

title: Action Figure Box
prompt_text: Turn the subject into a premium action figure package shot. Collectible toy box, accessories layout, retail-ready lighting, ultra detailed packaging design.

title: Luxury Product Shot
prompt_text: Create a luxury commercial product shot. Soft studio light, premium materials, elegant reflections, clean background, ad-ready composition.

title: Anime Makeover
prompt_text: Transform the subject into a polished anime-style character. Expressive eyes, clean linework, vibrant colors, high-end anime poster finish.

title: Sticker Pack
prompt_text: Create a cohesive sticker pack from the subject. Multiple expressions, bold outlines, transparent background, clean die-cut sticker style.

title: Transparent Background Prompt
prompt_text: Prepare the subject for transparent background output. Isolated object, clean edges, centered composition, high separation from background.

title: Profile Avatar
prompt_text: Generate a clean premium profile avatar. Strong face focus, flattering light, modern color grading, social-profile-ready result.

title: Fashion Editorial
prompt_text: Create a high-fashion editorial image. Magazine quality styling, controlled studio lighting, luxury aesthetic, bold visual storytelling.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Concept
prompt_text: Design a high-CTR YouTube thumbnail concept. Strong focal subject, emotional expression, bold negative space for text, vibrant contrast.

title: Instagram Ad Creative
prompt_text: Create a scroll-stopping Instagram ad concept. Modern brand styling, clean hierarchy, premium lighting, conversion-oriented visual clarity.

title: Old Money Portrait
prompt_text: Create an old money portrait aesthetic. Quiet luxury, refined wardrobe, natural confidence, soft daylight, understated premium styling.

title: Cyberpunk Portrait
prompt_text: Transform the subject into a cyberpunk portrait. Neon atmosphere, futuristic fashion, moody shadows, cinematic sci-fi composition.

title: Passport / ID Photo Prompt
prompt_text: Generate a neutral passport-style portrait prompt. Straight posture, plain clean background, natural color, clear facial visibility, official-photo look.

title: Meme Scene Prompt
prompt_text: Create a meme-ready visual scene based on the subject. Exaggerated storytelling, readable expression, simple background, viral shareability.

title: Brand Poster Prompt
prompt_text: Create a premium brand poster. Strong hero composition, clean typography zone, commercial polish, premium campaign visual language.
